mapper.insert: insert into work_order_satisfaction_config(score, score_label, color, sort_order, enabled) values (#{score}, #{scoreLabel}, #{color}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: update work_order_satisfaction_config set score = #{score}, score_label = #{scoreLabel}, color = #{color}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, score, score_label, color, sort_order, enabled from work_order_satisfaction_config where id = #{id}
select id, score, score_label, color, sort_order, enabled from work_order_satisfaction_config where score = #{score}
select id, score, score_label, color, sort_order, enabled from work_order_satisfaction_config order by sort_order asc
select id, score, score_label, color, sort_order, enabled from work_order_satisfaction_config where enabled = 1 order by sort_order asc
